hero.mainHeading: Enterprise AI Platforms for Automation, Intelligence & Scale
hero.subHeading: Explore our ecosystem of specialized machine learning platforms, generative AI tools, and enterprise automation SaaS solutions engineered to drive digital transformation.

products.label: Flagship Product
products.title: Jureo — The Intelligent AI Paralegal
products.heading: Patented AI Paralegal Solution for Law Firms & Corporate Teams
products.desc: Accelerate legal research and compliance with our advanced generative AI platform. Master precedent mapping and automate fact extraction to scale your legal operations seamlessly.

products.label: Regulatory Intelligence
products.title: Compliance & Regulatory AI Engine
products.desc: Streamline risk analysis for financial institutions with our AI-powered RegTech platform. Automate complex data pipelines and ensure robust compliance at enterprise scale.

products.label: R&D Intelligence
products.title: Fragrance Data Intelligence Platform
products.desc: Unlock complex formulation data using LLM-based prompt engineering. Transform natural language into structured insights to accelerate your R&D workflows.

products.label: Enterprise Automation
products.title: Enterprise Generative AI Chatbot
products.desc: Deploy secure, conversational AI assistants powered by Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). Deliver instant, verifiable answers grounded strictly in your proprietary data.

products.label: Sports Tech Platform
products.title: Intelligent Fantasy League System
products.desc: Modernize sports management with an API-driven automation platform. Sync rosters, manage contracts, and scale your league operations with absolute precision.

banner.text: All enterprise AI solutions are powered by our secure Zero-Retention Framework. Your proprietary data drives your digital transformation but never leaves your secure environment.
